headline: Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT) Sees Quarterly Revenue Exceeding Forecasts
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is among the Best Performing Stocks. On May 14, Reuters reported that Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) outlook for Q3 revenue and profit is above projections because of strong artificial intelligence and data center demand. The company sees revenue coming in at about $8.95 billion plus or minus $500 million, beating LSEG expectations […]
